title: Agent
short_description: A cancelled Cold War spy game from Rockstar North, announced for PS3 in 2009.
description: Agent was a cancelled Cold War-era spy game being developed by Rockstar North and published by Rockstar Games. Codenamed 'Jimmy' internally (a reference to James Bond), the game began development after Grand Theft Auto: San Andreas alongside GTA IV, with the studio split evenly between the two projects before GTA IV was prioritised. Agent was formally announced for the PlayStation 3 in 2009, but its trademark was abandoned in 2018 and the listing was later removed from Rockstar Games's website without the game ever releasing.
